types.name: Land Acquisition
types.description: Risks tied to land identification, notification, valuation, possession and handover under RFCTLARR/CALA processes.

types.name: Forest & Environmental Clearance
types.description: Stage-I/II forest, EC, CRZ, wildlife and biodiversity clearance risks under MoEFCC.

types.name: Utility Shifting
types.description: Risks from shifting electric, water, sewer, gas, OFC, and telecom utilities along the alignment.

types.name: Geotechnical & Subsurface
types.description: Soil, rock, ground-water, slope, settlement and unforeseen subsurface conditions.

types.name: Monsoon & Weather
types.description: Risks from monsoon, cyclones, fog, extreme heat or cold affecting site progress.

types.name: Material Price & Supply
types.description: Price escalation, shortage, quality and logistics of construction materials.

types.name: Labour & Equipment
types.description: Skilled/unskilled labour availability, plant, machinery and equipment productivity risks.

types.name: Design & Technical
types.description: Risks from design errors, late RFI/IFC drawings, BIM clashes and technical-standard revisions.

types.name: Construction Quality
types.description: Workmanship defects, NCR, rework, durability and quality non-conformances.

types.name: Health, Safety & Environment
types.description: Site HSE incidents, fatalities, LTI, environmental harm and BOCW compliance.

types.name: Stakeholder & Law & Order
types.description: Community protests, local body opposition, agitations and law-and-order disruptions.

types.name: Statutory & Regulatory
types.description: Approvals, NOCs, licences and regulator decisions affecting scope or schedule.

types.name: Contractual
types.description: Risks arising from contract clauses, claims, variations, EOT, LD and disputes.

types.name: Crowd Management
types.description: Mass-gathering crowd surge, stampede, queue control and capacity-management risks.

types.name: Public Health & Sanitation
types.description: Sanitation, vector control, water-borne disease and epidemic risks at mass events.

types.name: Temporary Infrastructure
types.description: Risks in temporary roads, pontoon bridges, tents, sheds and lighting for events.

types.name: River & Ghat Safety
types.description: Drowning, ghat-step erosion, currents and river-traffic risks at sangam events.

types.name: Public Safety & Law & Order
types.description: Terror, sabotage, communal flare-up and crowd policing at mass events.

types.name: Vendor & Food Safety
types.description: Langar, prasad, food vendor hygiene and gas-cylinder safety risks.

types.name: Communal & VVIP Protocol
types.description: Akhada precedence, naga-baba protocol, VVIP movement and ceremonial coordination.

types.name: Interstate & Inter-Agency Coordination
types.description: Multi-state, multi-agency coordination for transport, security and logistics.

types.name: Manufacturing Operations
types.description: Plant operations, OEE, line balance, MES and process risks.

types.name: Pharma GxP & Regulatory
types.description: GMP/GLP/GCP, USFDA, EMA, CDSCO, validation and data-integrity risks.

types.name: IT Delivery
types.description: Software and infrastructure delivery, vendor, integration and release risks.

types.name: Cybersecurity
types.description: Cyber threats, data breach, ransomware and information-security control gaps.

types.name: Telecom Infrastructure
types.description: Spectrum, ROW, tower, fibre, EMF and telecom-network rollout risks.

types.name: Financial Regulatory
types.description: RBI, SEBI, IRDAI, KYC, AML, model-risk and financial-services compliance.

types.name: Healthcare & Clinical
types.description: Patient safety, clinical protocols, NABH, ABDM and bio-medical risks.

types.name: Aerospace & Defense Program
types.description: AS9100, ITAR/SCOMET, DGAQA, FOD and defence-program acceptance risks.

types.name: Mining Operations
types.description: DGMS, tailings, slope stability, ventilation and mine-safety risks.

types.name: Maritime & Shipping
types.description: MARPOL, port-state inspection, dry-dock, demurrage and vessel-operations risks.

types.name: Agriculture & Supply Chain
types.description: Cold-chain, MSP, FPO, sowing-window, pest and agri-supply-chain risks.

types.name: Schedule
types.description: Critical path, float erosion, milestone slip and progress-tracking risks.

types.name: Resource
types.description: Manpower, materials, plant and key-resource availability and productivity.

types.name: Financial
types.description: Funding, cashflow, working capital, FX and project-finance risks.

types.name: Communication & PMO
types.description: Governance, change control, reporting, stakeholder communication and PMO discipline.

types.name: External & Geopolitical
types.description: Geopolitics, sanctions, elections, NGT and broader external environment.

types.name: Force Majeure
types.description: Natural disasters, pandemic, war and other defined force-majeure events.

categories.name: Land acquisition (generic)
categories.description: Catch-all parent for land acquisition risks not captured by a more specific code.

categories.name: 3A notification delay
categories.description: Section 3A notification under NHAI Act not gazetted in time, blocking 3D process.

categories.name: 3D award dispute
categories.description: Award under Section 3D contested by landowners; reference to court likely.

categories.name: RFCTLARR compensation negotiation stalled
categories.description: Compensation under RFCTLARR Act 2013 disputed; CALA award pending.

categories.name: CALA award delay
categories.description: Competent Authority for Land Acquisition fails to publish award within statutory timeline.

categories.name: Court injunction on possession
categories.description: High Court / civil court stay halts physical possession of awarded land.

categories.name: Encroachment by Jhuggi settlements
categories.description: Informal settlements on RoW require RFCTLARR-compliant rehabilitation before clearance.

categories.name: Temple/shrine relocation sensitivity
categories.description: Religious structures in alignment require careful, time-consuming relocation.

categories.name: Tribal PESA gram-sabha consent pending
categories.description: Scheduled-area projects need PESA gram sabha consent which slips.

categories.name: Social Impact Assessment incomplete
categories.description: SIA report under RFCTLARR not completed within statutory window.

categories.name: R&R package dispute
categories.description: Resettlement & Rehabilitation entitlements disputed by displaced families.

categories.name: Demolition notice contested
categories.description: Notice for structure demolition challenged in court or by elected reps.

categories.name: Private forest land identification
categories.description: Discovery of private forest land triggers parallel forest clearance process.

categories.name: Government land mutation pending
categories.description: State revenue records not updated; transfer to NHAI / agency delayed.

categories.description: Treasury delay in releasing CALA funds blocks award disbursement.

categories.name: Awardee bank account validation failure
categories.description: DBT to landowner blocked by KYC / Aadhaar mismatch.

categories.name: Legal-heir certificate litigation
categories.description: Multiple legal heirs claim award; civil suit filed.

categories.description: Awarded RoW falls short of design width; supplementary acquisition needed.

categories.description: State revenue authority disputes NHAI competent-authority designation.

categories.name: Inter-district coordination delay
categories.description: Project crosses district boundaries; multi-DC coordination slips.

categories.description: In-principle Stage-I forest clearance under FCA 1980 not granted.

categories.name: Forest Stage-II clearance pending
categories.description: Final Stage-II clearance pending compensatory afforestation deposit.

categories.description: National Board for Wildlife NOC required for sensitive zones.

categories.name: CRZ clearance pending
categories.description: Coastal Regulation Zone clearance required for coastal stretches.

categories.description: Mandatory public hearing under EIA notification disrupted or postponed.

categories.description: Petition before National Green Tribunal seeking project halt.

categories.description: CPCB night-time noise limits restrict pile-driving and night work.
